seo.title: Building Hetzner setup and optimization with Hetzner and...
seo.description: A step-by-step implementation guide for Hetzner setup and optimization with Hetzner and Contabo.

content.intro: This guide provides a structured approach to deploying and securing a VPS using European providers like Hetzner. Focuses on production-ready setup, automation, and scaling considerations for developers prioritizing control and compliance.

steps.title: Provision VPS with European provider
steps.explanation: Select a provider and server plan matching your region requirements. Enable IPv6 if needed. Configure initial firewall rules to allow SSH (port 22) and HTTP/HTTPS (ports 80/443).

code.content: hcloud server create --name my-app --image ubuntu-22.04 --plan cpx11 --location nbg1

pitfalls: Not enabling IPv6 support for European compliance

steps.title: Initial server hardening
steps.explanation: Update system packages, create a non-root user, and configure SSH to disable root login. Set up basic firewall rules using UFW.

code.content:
adduser devuser
usermod -aG sudo devuser
ufw allow OpenSSH
ufw enable

pitfalls: Leaving root account active for extended periods
Not restricting SSH access to specific IP ranges

steps.title: Deploy application with automation
steps.explanation: Use Ansible or a shell script to deploy your application. Include steps for installing dependencies, setting environment variables, and configuring systemd services.

code.content:
- name: Deploy app
  hosts: all
  tasks:
    - name: Clone repository
      git:
        repo: https://github.com/example/app.git
        dest: /var/www/app

pitfalls: Not testing automation in staging environment

steps.title: Configure SSL and reverse proxy
steps.explanation: Set up Caddy or Nginx as reverse proxy. Use Let's Encrypt for SSL certificates. Configure HTTP-to-HTTPS redirection and HSTS headers.
pitfalls: Incorrect DNS configuration for certificate validation
Forgetting to renew certificates before expiration

steps.title: Implement monitoring and logging
steps.explanation: Install Prometheus and Grafana for metrics. Configure syslog forwarding to centralized logging. Set up alerts for disk usage and service status.

code.content:
sudo apt install prometheus grafana
sudo systemctl enable prometheus

pitfalls: Not configuring log rotation for systemd journals
Ignoring disk space alerts during high traffic

content.conclusion: This setup provides a secure, automated VPS foundation. Verify all services through live traffic tests, ensure disaster recovery plans include server snapshots, and monitor resource usage to inform scaling decisions.
